title: salsola oppositifolia var. verticillata
intro: Salsola oppositifolia var. verticillata, commonly known as pricky saltwort or pricky glasswort, is a succulent shrub-like plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salsola oppositifolia var. verticillata include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and ointments to topical applications.
